notes: INFRA-ORIGIN, THEN SERVICE CASCADE. Node ip-10-0-37-15.us-east-1 hits MemoryPressure (a olapdb-vw-write pod ran with memory request 0 / no limit and grew, commit 0e2b4d6f removed the resource limit), the kubelet evicts the olapdb-vw-write pod. With the write virtual-warehouse pod gone, olapdb-server write/commit queries fail, and platform-api surfaces query-failure 5xx. platform-api is LOUDEST/paged (query-failure alarm) but is the LAST victim. The first edge is node->pod (eviction, shared-infra), then the rest is a service-call cascade (olapdb-vw-write->olapdb-server->platform-api). olapdb-vw-write accepted as alias (the evicted pod). A model that blames platform-api query failures misses the node memory-pressure origin.
